claim_boundary: diagnostic tower-geometry and ABC-runtime evidence only
no tower advantage or disadvantage claim
no claim that the counterpoint environment is degenerate
no claim that noisy-rate contraction is generally good or bad beyond observed artifact evidence

goal_criteria.claim_if_met: The noisy-rate diagnostic completed its artifact contract.
goal_criteria.claim_if_not_met: The diagnostic cannot yet support human-readable interpretation.
goal_criteria.failure_signal: run index or core result tables are missing
goal_criteria.partial_signal: some arms or summary tables are missing
goal_criteria.question: Did every requested noisy-rate arm produce required evidence?
goal_criteria.success_signal: all required noisy-rate result tables exist and every requested rate arm is represented

goal_criteria.claim_if_met: The evaluation reports whether low expected-rate selection leaves sources unselected.
goal_criteria.claim_if_not_met: The evaluation risks repeating the source-local fraction confusion.
goal_criteria.partial_signal: selected edges are present but source coverage is incomplete
goal_criteria.question: Can a reader distinguish selected edge share from selected source coverage?
goal_criteria.success_signal: source coverage and zero-selected-source counts are present

goal_criteria.claim_if_met: The metadata summaries describe the same edges the runtime schema contracted.
goal_criteria.claim_if_not_met: The structural diagnosis is invalid until mapping is fixed.
goal_criteria.partial_signal: consistency exists but has mixed status
goal_criteria.question: Do metadata-selected and runtime-selected edge sets agree?
goal_criteria.success_signal: selection_consistency reports equality for every non-control arm

goal_criteria.claim_if_met: The evaluation identifies observed collapse threshold behavior under noisy-rate semantics.
goal_criteria.claim_if_not_met: The evaluation cannot distinguish threshold behavior.
goal_criteria.partial_signal: collapse status exists for only part of the sweep
goal_criteria.question: Does the sweep reveal whether collapse appears immediately or at a higher rate?
goal_criteria.success_signal: noisy_rate_threshold_summary reports first collapse and last nontrivial rate

goal_criteria.claim_if_met: The evaluation distinguishes constructed quotient shape from live executable control surface.
goal_criteria.claim_if_not_met: The evaluation risks confusing quotient construction with execution.
goal_criteria.question: Can a human tell which tiers are actually executable?
goal_criteria.success_signal: active action-cell counts, tier occupancy, lift, and concrete steps are summarized

structural_limit_checks.interpretation_if_triggered: The metadata table and runtime schema do not identify the same contracted edges.
Increasing requested rate did not preserve selected-edge nesting.

structural_limit_checks.claim_effect: marks this arm as a very low-width structural diagnostic
structural_limit_checks.interpretation_if_triggered: No source contributed selected outgoing edges at this rate.
The first scheduled block collapses all base states into one state cell.

structural_limit_checks.claim_effect: marks quotient geometry as structurally limiting
structural_limit_checks.interpretation_if_triggered: One tier-1 cell contains at least 90 percent of base states.

structural_limit_checks.claim_effect: supports coverage-threshold interpretation if collapse appears at or after this point
structural_limit_checks.interpretation_if_triggered: A high share of source states contributed at least one selected outgoing edge.
